title: Living Luminaries: On the Serious Business of Happiness
original_title: Living Luminaries: On the Serious Business of Happiness
overview: An actor hits the wall with ego and vices in the modern times and decides to pursue the answers to happiness. A docudrama with extraordinary interviews and insights to wisdom.
